KAWA_KANZURURU.name: Cooperative Kawa Kanzururu
KAWA_KANZURURU.palette_text: ONLY these 6 colors: light blue #5BA3D9, green #4CAF50, cherry red #E53935, coffee brown #5D4037, black #000000, white #FFFFFF
KAWA_KANZURURU.identity: Fairtrade arabica coffee cooperative Beni Rwenzori DRC. Authentic harvest, mountains, red cherries.

design_rules.style: Editorial brand design, clean agricultural premium, not stock photo clutter
design_rules.background: white #FFFFFF or soft off-white, never busy patterns
design_rules.typography: Bold sans-serif, black text with blue accent underline or stripe — like logo split effect
design_rules.composition: 60% negative space, hero subject left or center, text block bottom-left, logo zone bottom-right clear
design_rules.mood: Premium Fairtrade, authentic Nord-Kivu terroir, morning golden light on natural greens and cherry red only

UZAAPP.name: UZAAPP
UZAAPP.palette_text: STRICT 4-color palette ONLY: orange-red #E85D2C, teal #1A8A8A, white #FFFFFF, black #000000
UZAAPP.identity: Mobile e-commerce marketplace Congo DRC. Friendly, modern, product-focused.

design_rules.style: Modern app marketing, flat design with subtle depth, e-commerce product card
design_rules.background: Solid orange #E85D2C dominant (70%) with teal #1A8A8A accent corner (15%) — mirror app icon layout
design_rules.typography: Bold white sans-serif on orange, price in large white numerals, minimal text
design_rules.composition: Product hero center, curved black divider optional, teal corner accent top-right, UZAAPP feel
design_rules.mood: Energetic but controlled, mobile-first, clean marketplace — never chaotic multicolor

INVESTEE_GROUP.name: Investee Group
INVESTEE_GROUP.palette_text: MONOCHROME teal palette ONLY: teal cyan #268FA5, black #000000, white #FFFFFF — no other hues
INVESTEE_GROUP.identity: B2B NTIC consultancy Butembo. Growth, cybersecurity, digital transformation.

design_rules.style: Corporate minimalist B2B, McKinsey-meets-tech, single-hue discipline
design_rules.background: White #FFFFFF or deep black #000000 with teal accents — never mixed rainbow
design_rules.typography: Geometric bold sans-serif, teal on white or white on black, wide letter-spacing for titles
design_rules.composition: Icon or briefcase motif left, headline right, 70% whitespace, growth chart line in teal only
design_rules.mood: Professional, trustworthy, enterprise-grade — strict teal monochrome

IM_SYSTEM.name: i-m System
IM_SYSTEM.palette_text: STRICT 3-color palette ONLY: sky blue #2196F3, navy #1A237E, white #FFFFFF
IM_SYSTEM.identity: SaaS ERP/CRM for Congolese SMEs. Inventory, invoicing, accounting modules.

design_rules.style: SaaS product marketing, clean UI mockup, dashboard preview
design_rules.background: White or light blue tint #E3F2FD — UI elements in blue and navy only
design_rules.typography: Rounded friendly sans for i-m, bold navy for System — match logo bubbly style
design_rules.composition: Dashboard or phone mockup center, blue UI cards, navy headers, white content areas
design_rules.mood: Modern SaaS, approachable business software — blue family only
